description_long: This is a large, metallic airplane with a robust fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The aircraft features four prominent turbofan engines mounted under the wings, two on each side, and a distinctive T-tail design with a single vertical stabilizer and a high horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with a multi-panel window arrangement for visibility. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The surface of the airplane is smooth and metallic, with visible panel lines and a generally utilitarian, military or cargo-oriented appearance.
description: A large, metallic airplane with high-mounted straight wings, four underwing turbofan engines, and a T-tail. The cockpit is forward and the landing gear is tricycle-type.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wingspan, four underwing engines, and the rounded cockpit nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high-wing configuration, T-tail, and the full length of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, engine arrangement, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the high-mounted wings, engine placement, and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all fixed and visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-panel windows at the front of the fuselage.
